dataset_rationale: Control run: original simulator pressure with richer catalog text. If this loses, the issue is behavioral calibration, not only content text.
Lower transition exits and stronger engagement to fix the prior near-total abandonment problem.
Tests whether retrieval improves when labels contain many clear positive completions.
More app-like engagement distribution: less brittle exits, stronger taste clusters, and moderate completion signal.
Sharper taste clusters and richer topical separation to test whether personalization improves with more learnable structure.
Harder tail-discovery setting with lower average quality and very sharp item niches.
Keeps the task harder with sharper user/item taste clusters and stronger long-tail separation.
